title: Boostium
body:
![Boostium Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d65721cba3204cd6793a3cdbe39cc803b6987bc4_0.webp)


## Requirements
The pack currently doesnt
have requirements.

4 - 3gb of ram recommended
for the game



## Bug reporting
Report any bugs to my [discord server](https://discord.gg/HCrNpNC5hX)




## Compatibility
**Boostium** currently works in versions `1.19.2 - 1.21.1`




## Credits

This project was made and is being maintained by bszartur

The biggest thanks to [**KasaiSora**](https://www.youtube.com/@KasaiSora) and his project
[**Perforium**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/performium-was-taken) for the idea
